detailed_description.heading: High-Resolution Monitoring
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Camera AI Turret (UVC-AI-Turret) is an intelligent surveillance solution equipped with advanced AI-powered features to enhance security and monitoring. Featuring an 8 MP 3840 x 2160 (16:9) resolution and a 1/1.8" 8MP sensor, this camera delivers high-resolution video with crisp detail and clear image quality. It supports AI-based object detection, classification, and tracking, allowing it to identify people, vehicles, and other objects with high accuracy. This advanced detection helps reduce false alarms and improves situational awareness, making the UVC-AI-Turret suitable for modern security systems in residential, commercial, and many industrial environments. Designed to integrate seamlessly with the UniFi Protect ecosystem, the UVC-AI-Turret offers intuitive management and monitoring. With UniFi Protect’s user-friendly interface, you can easily view live feeds, analyze recorded footage, and customize settings to meet your specific security requirements.

detailed_description.heading: Exceptional Performance
detailed_description.text: Engineered with superior imaging technology, the UVC-AI-Turret excels in challenging lighting conditions. It supports night vision with its integrated infrared (IR) LEDs, offering visibility up to 15 meters in complete darkness. Additionally, its advanced Wide Dynamic Range (WDR) technology ensures balanced exposure in scenes with high contrast, enabling the camera to capture critical details even in backlit conditions or low light. Whether monitoring outdoor spaces at night or indoor areas with variable lighting, the AI Turret consistently provides high-quality video footage for reliable surveillance. The camera supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), simplifying installation by requiring only a single cable for both power and data. With scalable integration capabilities, the UVC-AI-Turret fits effortlessly into existing UniFi networks, providing a cutting-edge security solution for businesses and homes.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Design
detailed_description.text: The UVC-AI-Turret features a compact, weatherproof, and vandal-resistant design, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. Its IP67-rated enclosure protects against dust and water, while its IK10-rated construction ensures resistance to impacts and tampering. The camera operates effectively in a wide temperature range of -30°C to 60°C (-22°F to 140°F), ensuring consistent performance in both freezing winters and scorching summers. The versatile mounting options and 3-axis adjustment make it easy to position the camera for optimal coverage. This robust design, combined with its advanced AI features, makes the AI Turret ideal for diverse applications, including storefronts, parking lots, offices, and industrial facilities.
